arts.ttl: Alan Shearer loved what Arsenal supporters did vs Real Madrid in stunning win
arts.sum: Alan Shearer has heaped praise on Arsenal after their dominant 3-0 win over Real Madrid in the Champions League on Tuesday night . And former Newcastle United striker Shearer has now offered his view on Arsenal's fantastic victory over Real, paying special credit to the atmosphere at the Emirates Stadium.

arts.ttl: Edu pens heartfelt message to Arsenal fans after officially leaving sporting director role... as the Brazilian sends 'warmest wishes' to new Gunners chief Andrea Berta
arts.sum: The Brazilian left his role as sporting director in November after five-and-a-half years, having previously been part of the famous 'Invincibles' squad as a player

arts.ttl: Real Madrid handed sudden injury boost ahead of Arsenal 2nd leg

arts.ttl: 'I have seen': Erik ten Hag says one Arsenal player is absolutely 'ruthless', he's like a 'soldier'
Andrea Berta has Arsenal priority as transfer window plans have changed amid contract talks
arts.sum: New deals for the two young stars will likely be one of the first bits of business to come under the purview of new sporting director Andrea Berta, and football.london understands that their emergence into the first team has also changed the club's summer transfer plans. Arsenal are confident of securing new contracts for both Ethan Nwaneri and Myles Lewis-Skelly, football.london understands.

arts.ttl: Kai Havertz shares fresh injury update as Arsenal timeline theory emerges
arts.sum: Not only that, the Gunners also have bigger things to focus on following their significant 3-0 win over Real Madrid in the first leg of their Champions League quarter-final tie earlier this week. The Athletic journalist David Ornstein was asked about Havertz's recovery in a Q+A session on Thursday and shared his own theory about Arsenal's plan for the forward.
